Tests for the `Math.asin` function with various inputs to verify expected return values.


## Files
- **[15.08.02.03-001.js](15.08.02.03-001.js.md)**: Tests that `Math.asin(NaN)` returns `NaN` using an assertion.
- **[15.08.02.03-002.js](15.08.02.03-002.js.md)**: Tests the Math.asin function for input slightly greater than 1 to confirm it returns NaN.

- **[15.08.02.03-004.js](15.08.02.03-004.js.md)**: Tests the `Math.asin` function with a value slightly less than -1 to ensure it returns NaN.
- **[15.08.02.03-005.js](15.08.02.03-005.js.md)**: Tests that `Math.asin` returns `NaN` for input slightly less than -1.
- **[15.08.02.03-006.js](15.08.02.03-006.js.md)**: Tests the Math.asin function to confirm it returns NaN for input -3.
- **[15.08.02.03-007.js](15.08.02.03-007.js.md)**: Tests the Math.asin function for the input +0 to ensure it returns +0.
- **[15.08.02.03-008.js](15.08.02.03-008.js.md)**: Tests the Math.asin function with a negative zero input.
- **[15.08.02.03-009.js](15.08.02.03-009.js.md)**: Tests the Math.asin function to verify it returns π/2 for an input of 1.
